title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description:
Business intelligence Analyst
- 12-month Fixed term contract.
Location:
Thorpe Park
, Leeds,
Hybrid, flexible
working available.
Step into the role of
Business Intelligence Analyst
and play a key part in driving insight across the full end‑to‑end litigation journey at Overdales. You'll work closely with our Strategy Delivery team and leaders across the business, diving into data to understand performance, spot trends, and influence decision‑making. From building and maintaining Power BI reporting and supporting our BI framework, to analysing strategy effectiveness-like how our communications land or how customers engage digitally-you'll turn data into meaningful recommendations. You'll collaborate with stakeholders to understand their MI needs, keep documentation up to date, solve problems as they arise, and deliver high‑quality ad‑hoc analysis when the business needs it. If you're someone who loves getting into the detail, understands the operational metrics that drive success, and enjoys continuously monitoring KPIs to help shape smarter strategies, this role is for you.
What we are looking for:
Strong numeracy skills and confidence working with quantitative data
Experience in an analytical role with solid problem‑solving and curiosity
Intermediate SQL skills and capability to build dashboards in Power BI (or similar BI tools)
Proficient use of MS Office, especially Excel
Effective communicator with the ability to influence stakeholders
Able to manage multiple priorities and work both independently and within a wider team
If you're excited about this role and don't meet every requirement, don't worry. We'd still love to hear from you because your unique perspective could be just what we're looking for.
What you'll get:
A discretionary annual bonus
to reward your impact
3% flexible
benefits
that you can tailor to suit your lifestyle, whether that's extra cash, more holiday, or added health cover.
Hybrid working
for the best of both worlds-collaboration and focus.
Free onsite parking
, saving you time and money.
Recharge and refresh
opportunities
with 28 days of holiday plus public holidays, and the option to buy up to five more-giving you more time for what matters most.
Peace of mind
with life assurance that supports your loved ones, no matter what.
A culture that celebrates you and supports your wellbeing
-
with recognition awards, access to on-site gym facilities, and a variety of wellbeing initiatives offered throughout the year to help you stay balanced, resilient and feeling your best.
Encouragement to be your authentic self at work
by joining one of our vibrant employee networks-like Rise (Gender), Proud (LGBTQIA+), Culture, or Spark (Neurodiversity & Disability) - and connect with a community that celebrates and supports you.
So, who are we?
We're Overdales Legal. Regulated by the SRA, we're one of the largest providers of specialist debt Litigation services in the UK. We're a proud member of Lowell Group.
